Usage: repose uninstall [OPTIONS] REPA

  remove specified repository from target and uninstall product

Arguments:
  REPA  REPA pattern specification for needed repository  [required]

Options:
  -t, --target HOST  target to operate on  [required]
  --no-reboot        on transactional hosts (SL Micro), stage the package change
                     but do not reboot/reconnect/verify (default: reboot)
  -h, --help         Show this message and exit.
